meals.name: Breakfast: Protein Pancakes
ingredients: whole grain oats, banana, egg, protein powder, almond milk
meals.reason: High in protein and complex carbs for muscle recovery and energy
swaps: use Greek yogurt instead of almond milk for extra protein

meals.name: Lunch: Grilled Chicken Salad
ingredients: mixed greens, grilled chicken breast, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, olive oil, lemon, feta cheese
meals.reason: Lean protein and veggies for muscle growth and recovery
swaps: use avocado instead of feta cheese for healthy fats

meals.name: Snack: Cottage Cheese and Fruit
meals.reason: Great source of casein protein for muscle repair
swaps: swap mixed berries for sliced peaches

meals.name: Dinner: Baked Salmon with Quinoa and Veggies
ingredients: salmon, quinoa, broccoli, carrots, olive oil, lemon, salt, pepper
meals.reason: Omega-3 fatty acids, lean protein, and complex carbs for muscle growth
swaps: use brown rice instead of quinoa for more carbs

meals.name: Evening Snack: Greek Yogurt with Honey
meals.reason: Protein-rich snack before bed for muscle recovery
swaps: swap mixed nuts for chia seeds for more omega-3 fatty acids
